sql.title: Database Skills
sql.reason: SQL is required for this job.
sql.suggestion: Add SQL projects, joins, aggregation and database work to your resume.

docker.title: Containerization
docker.reason: Docker is commonly required for ML deployment.
docker.suggestion: Containerize one of your ML projects and mention it in your resume.

aws.title: Cloud Computing
aws.reason: Cloud experience improves your ML profile.
aws.suggestion: Deploy one project using AWS Free Tier or mention cloud coursework.

tensorflow.reason: TensorFlow is required in this role.
tensorflow.suggestion: Build one TensorFlow-based project and add it to your resume.
